title: Cursor engine state
description: Tracks the VS Code engine version embedded in the latest stable Cursor release. Read and written by cursor-engine-sync.yml via copilot-swe-agent.

vscode_version.description: The vscodeVersion value from Cursor's product.json, e.g. '1.105.1'. Reset to the newly-detected value whenever Cursor ships a new engine.

first_observed_at.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC) when this vscode_version was first seen in a stable Cursor release. engines.vscode and @types/vscode in packages/vscode-extension/package.json bump 30 days after this date.

cursor_app_version.description: The Cursor app version string at the time vscode_version was observed, e.g. '3.5.33'.

source.description: How vscode_version was determined — e.g. 'Cursor.app/Contents/Resources/app/product.json (local inspection)' or 'cursor.com/changelog (entry for 3.5.33)'.

notes.description: Free-form notes for this entry. Cite your evidence and any deviation from the standard detection procedure.
